content.question: Give a brief account of the first day / first visit of Zitkala Sa in the land of apples.
content.answer: The first day of Zitkala Sa in the land of apples was that of a bitter cold one because of the snow-covered ground. In such a chilly condition, the trees were found to be bare. Besides, Zitkala-Sa experienced a constant clash of harsh noise with an undercurrent of many noises murmuring in an unknown tongue. All these created a bedlam in the mind of Zitkala-Sa.
